D23.ai

WhatsApp AI Assistant for India

  1. Home

  3. D23.ai
India's #1 WhatsApp AI

ChatGPT for India, on WhatsApp

D23.ai brings the power of advanced AI to 500M+ Indians on WhatsApp. Ask questions in Hindi, send voice notes in Tamil, generate images, check train PNR, search the web - all in the app you already use daily.

No app downloads. No sign-ups. No English required. Just message and get instant, intelligent responses in 11+ Indian languages.

Average response time: <2 seconds

Indian Languages
Features

Powerful AI Capabilities

Everything you need from an AI assistant, right in WhatsApp.

Voice Messages

Send voice messages in any Indian language and get intelligent responses. No typing needed - just speak naturally.

11+ Indian Languages

Hindi, English, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam, Punjabi, and more supported natively.

Image Generation

Create stunning AI-generated images from text descriptions. Perfect for creative projects and visualizations.

Train PNR Status

Check Indian Railways PNR status instantly. Get booking details, seat confirmation, and train schedules.

Web Search

Search the web and get summarized, accurate answers. Stay updated with real-time information.

Smart Conversations

Have natural, context-aware conversations. D23.ai remembers context and provides relevant follow-up responses.

Use Cases

What You Can Do with D23.ai

Everyday tasks made simple through WhatsApp.

Ask Anything

Get answers to questions on any topic - education, health, technology, general knowledge, and more.

Travel Planning

Check train PNR status, get travel information, and plan your journeys with real-time data.

Create Images

Generate unique images from text descriptions for personal projects, social media, or creative work.

Language Translation

Translate text between Indian languages and English seamlessly within your conversations.

Content Writing

Get help with writing emails, messages, essays, and professional documents in your preferred language.

Research & Facts

Search the web and get summarized, accurate information with sources for any research topic.

Why D23.ai

Why Choose D23.ai Over Other AI Assistants?

Built specifically for India, not adapted from Western products.

How It Works

Start in 30 Seconds

No downloads, no sign-ups, no hassle.

1

Open WhatsApp

Use the WhatsApp you already have installed

2

Save Our Number

Add D23.ai to your contacts or scan QR

3

Send "Hi"

Start a conversation in any language

4

Get AI Responses

Receive instant, intelligent answers
